entities.name: Rexy Phase 6 Priorities
facts: Use source priority: staff corrections, Adult ASA website/API, live source snapshots, brain, saved facts, Discord history, ASA wiki/internet, general knowledge.
Continuously refresh website source snapshots and preserve conversation context per user/channel.
Personality should be bouncy, funny, smarter, faster, but never annoying or inaccurate.

entities.name: Adult ASA
facts: ASA is the default context; do not answer with ASE information unless explicitly asked.
Base Guardians are unavailable on Extinction and Astraeos.
LudopARK Casino is only on Valguero.
Level 150 Acro on Adult ASA usually needs about 10-15 Bio Toxin; bring 50 to be safe.
Cyber Structures pull range should be 500 foundations.
Website/player movement API should override guesses for playtime, map totals, joins, transfers, and player history.
